top3.sql:
SELECT 
    t.balance,
    c.gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance AS sum_after_transaction,
    c.gender AS owner_gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance,
    c.gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance AS sum_after_transaction,
    c.gender AS owner_gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a USING (account_id)
JOIN disp d USING (account_id)
JOIN client c USING (client_id)
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance AS sum_after_transaction,
    c.gender AS owner_gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance,
    c.gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    t.balance AS sum_after_transaction,
    c.gender AS owner_gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a USING (account_id)
JOIN disp d USING (account_id)
JOIN client c USING (client_id)
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;

SELECT 
    SUM(t.balance) AS total_balance,
    c.gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851
GROUP BY c.gender;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    t.balance,
    c.gender
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 4 
  AND t.trans_id = 851;
